Event: Magic Training - Treewing
Event Date: 28/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: W47
Treewing Tamer Wand

Once in a while, one of the following effects is triggered, depending on the current health of the attack target:
- If the target has over 50% health, armor is stripped from the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it. The units stripped of their armor lose 55% of their armor stats, and cannot use armor abilities for 4 sec. Targets are also petrified for 4 sec. and receive 600000 magic damage. For 4 sec., petrified enemy units cannot attack or move, and take 40% more damage.
- If the target has less than 50% health, 3 positive effects are removed from it; the target and all enemy units in a large radius around it receive magic damage equal to 110% of the wand wielder's spell power.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Magic Training - Treewing

Event date: 28/12/2025

Sage bot code: W47

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
